headline: Retina & Diabetic Eye Care in Chennai
subheadline: Specialized retina evaluation for diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration by AIIMS-trained, Medical Retina Fellowship-certified Dr. Rajeswari in KK Nagar.
metaDescription: Diabetic retinopathy and macular degeneration screening in KK Nagar, Chennai with Medical Retina Fellowship-trained Dr. Rajeswari. Call or book online.
symptomsTitle: Could You Need a Retina Checkup?
symptoms: You have diabetes, regardless of how well controlled
Sudden floaters or flashes of light
Age 50+ with no recent dilated eye exam

processSteps.title: Dilated Retina Exam
processSteps.description: A thorough examination of the retina and macula to detect early changes.

processSteps.title: Imaging & Diagnosis
processSteps.description: Retinal imaging to precisely assess the extent of any damage.

processSteps.title: Tailored Management
processSteps.description: From monitoring to injections or laser treatment -- matched to what your eyes actually need.
